title: Pre-populate income from profile for returning applicant
description: As a returning mortgage applicant, I want my previously verified annual income to pre-populate in the DIP journey so that I can complete the form faster and with fewer errors.
goal: pre-populate previously verified annual income in DIP
benefit: complete the journey faster with fewer data-entry mistakes
acceptanceCriteria: Given a returning applicant with a verified income record, when the DIP journey starts, then annual income is pre-populated.
Given no verified income record exists, when the journey starts, then annual income remains blank and editable.
Given a pre-populated value is present, when the applicant edits it, then the updated value is used for the decision request.

scenarios.title: Pre-populate verified annual income for a returning applicant
given: a returning applicant has a previously verified annual income of 52000
a new Decision-in-Principle journey has started
when: the applicant opens the affordability form
then: the applicant can continue without re-entering income

scenarios.title: Leave annual income blank when no verified record exists
given: a returning applicant does not have a verified annual income record
a new Decision-in-Principle journey has started
when: the applicant opens the affordability form
then: the annual income field is blank
the annual income field is editable

scenarios.title: Use applicant-edited annual income for the decision request
given: a returning applicant has a pre-populated annual income of 52000
a new Decision-in-Principle journey has started
when: the applicant changes annual income to 60000
they request a decision for a 180000 loan
then: the decision request uses annual income 60000
